author: BARNABAS

classification.cautionReason: Valued early Christian text, but not part of the biblical canon for mainstream Christian denominations.

lineage: Chapter XVII.—Conclusion of the first part of the epistle.

ccel.title: ANF01. The Apostolic Fathers with Justin Martyr and Irenaeus

source.title: ANF01. The Apostolic Fathers with Justin Martyr and Irenaeus

title: Chapter XVII.—Conclusion of the first part of the epistle.

source.title: ANF01. The Apostolic Fathers with Justin Martyr and Irenaeus

verses.text: As far as was possible, and could be done with perspicuity, I cherish the hope that, according to my desire, I have omitted none of those things at present [demanding consideration], which bear upon your salvation.
For if I should write to you about things future, ye would not understand, because such knowledge is hid in parables.
